pattern: XOR is its own inverse and is associative, so folding every value together cancels each duplicated pair and leaves the lone element behind in constant space.
hints: Pairs of equal numbers should somehow annihilate each other, leaving only the unique value.
Think of a bitwise operation where combining a value with itself yields zero and combining with zero is the identity.
Fold the array with XOR: every number that appears twice cancels to 0, and the survivor is the single number.

edge_inputs.description: lone value in the middle of interleaved pairs
max-magnitude duplicates around the lone value

stress.description: thousands of random pairs plus one planted unique value, shuffled
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    pairs = (n - 1) // 2
    used = set()
    arr = []
    while len(used) < pairs:
        v = rng.randrange(-30000, 30001)
        if v in used:
            continue
        used.add(v)
        arr.append(v)
        arr.append(v)
    while True:
        u = rng.randrange(-30000, 30001)
        if u not in used:
            break
    arr.append(u)
    rng.shuffle(arr)
    return [arr]
stress.note: exactly one value with odd multiplicity by construction
